channel.title: About on Adam Whitlock
channel.description: Recent content in About on Adam Whitlock

item.title: About
item.description: Here are some facts about Adam Whitlock: Has a great wife & father to three wonderful kids Grew up in Lincoln, NE but really hasn’t been back in a decade Worked for a few places (Linkedin, CDW, LeMans Corporation) Deals with the “big data” and “site reliability engineering” Lived for a while in the San Francisco Bay Area Works at Glassdoor from his house in Wisconsin Passionate about building good operations practices Probably drinks too much coffee Helps co-organize the MSN DevOps Meetup If you tell him you bike, he’ll assume you mean a bicycle Loves to teach and share what he knows Needs to surround himself with interesting people
